zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Radcliffe於1429年1月9日出生在英國藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾時，他的父親James Radcliffe19歲，母親Agnes Euby20歲。他於大約1450年與Isabel Tyldesley在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1485年8月22日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Radcliffe于1429年1月9日出生在英国藍卡爾奧爾德薩爾时，他的父亲James Radcliffe19岁，母亲Agnes Euby20岁。他于大约1450年与Isabel Tyldesley在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1485年8月22日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 博斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Radcliffe was born on 9 January 1429, in Ordsall, Lancashire, England, his father, James Radcliffe, was 19 and his mother, Agnes Euby, was 20. He married Isabel Tyldesley about 1450, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 22 August 1485, in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56, and was buried in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Radcliffe est né le 9 janvier 1429, à Ordsall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, James Radcliffe, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Agnes Euby, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Tyldesley environ 1450, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 22 août 1485, à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1450 in Lancashire, England Isabel Tyldesley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. August 1485 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Radcliffeが1429年1月9日にイギリスランカシュアイアオルドサルで生まれた時，父James Radcliffeは19歳，母Agnes Eubyは20歳であった。約1450年にイギリスランカシュアイアでIsabel Tyldesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1485年8月22日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ボスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Radcliffe(이)가 1429년 1월 9일 영국 랭카실르 르드사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Radcliffe(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Euby(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1450년 영국 랭카실르에서 Isabel Tyldesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1485년 8월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 보스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Radcliffe nasceu em 9 de janeiro de 1429, em Ordsall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Radcliffe, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Euby, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Tyldesley aproximadamente 1450, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1485, em Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Market Bosworth, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Radcliffe родился 9 января 1429 г. в местности ордсалл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени James Radcliffe было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Euby, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Tyldesley около 1450 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 22 августа 1485 г. в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности маркет босворт, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
